{
  "judge_id": "your_judge_id",

    "RX.1": "The agent does not demonstrate an understanding of uncertainty disclosure. All claims are presented as equally confident.",
    "RX.3": "The agent acknowledges the scope of the task but doesn't provide concrete evidence of adherence to it within the provided text.",
    "RX.4": "The agent identifies potential harm in the original text and suggests revisions to mitigate it, demonstrating some awareness of downstream impact.",
    "RX.5": "The agent does not discuss provenance or traceability of changes made to the text."

rationale.R1.5: The agent identifies a potential structural issue (ordering) and proposes a reordering with rationale.
rationale.R1.6: The agent highlights several areas for improvement in prose quality, suggesting edits to enhance clarity and flow.
rationale.RX.1: The agent does not demonstrate an understanding of uncertainty disclosure. All claims are presented as equally confident.
rationale.RX.3: The agent acknowledges the scope of the task but doesn't provide concrete evidence of adherence to it within the provided text.
rationale.RX.4: The agent identifies potential harm in the original text and suggests revisions to mitigate it, demonstrating some awareness of downstream impact.
rationale.RX.5: The agent does not discuss provenance or traceability of changes made to the text.
